title: rubus croceacanthus
intro: Rubus croceacanthus, also known as the Golden Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its bright yellow fruit and thorny stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of ellagic acid and other polyphenols. The health benefits of Rubus croceacanthus include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain pathogens. Rubus croceacanthus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also consumed as a fresh or dried fruit.
